AI Agency

Your business runs on agents now.

Named AI systems that answer your calls, handle your WhatsApp, research your leads, process your documents, and generate your reports. Not custom software. Deployable in weeks.

What We Build

Four ways to deploy AI in your business.

Start with one agent. Grow into an operating system.

Division 01

AI Agents

18 named agent types across voice, chat, knowledge, sales, and operations. Each one does a specific job, deployed in 3–4 weeks.

18 agent types →
Division 02

AI Automation

Connect your tools so work flows without humans pushing it. CRM ↔ email ↔ Sheets ↔ WhatsApp pipelines built and maintained.

Automation services →
Division 03 — Flagship

Amoris AIOS

Not one agent — an operating system. Multiple agents, shared memory, one command centre. This is where clients graduate to.

See AIOS →
Division 04

Strategy & Enablement

Not ready to build yet? Start with an AI Opportunity Audit — 2 weeks, full roadmap with ROI projections. Fee credited to any build.

See services →
Most Deployed

The agents clients start with.

Voice

AI Receptionist

Answers every call 24/7 in 6 languages. Books appointments. Never misses.

₹1.5L setup $3k setup
Chat

WhatsApp Business Agent

Full commerce on WhatsApp. Orders, payments, support — without a human agent for 80% of queries.

₹1.25L setup $2.5k setup
Knowledge

Internal Knowledge Agent

Staff ask questions. Agent answers from your SOPs and policies. With sources.

₹2L setup $4k setup
3–4 wks

Time to go live

From signed agreement to live agent handling real calls or messages.

6 langs

Voice agent languages

Hindi, English, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Marathi. Auto-detected per caller.

18 types

Named agent systems

Not "AI solutions" — specific systems with specific names, scopes, and prices.
